PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-15-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Corporon for Carol Golden (Petitioner) via CourtCall
Steven Weinkauf for SF Public Administrator (Petitioner)

Mr. Weinkauf stated that they are close to settlement, that it would be best to participate in mediation to ensure proposed resolution is reasonable, and that there is issue of presumption. Mr. Corporon stated that his client is willing to participate in mediation, his staff is setting up the date with a private mediator, and request a 60 day continuance to report back. The Amended Petition for Probate of Will and Letters of Administration with Will Annexed, and the Second Amended Petition for Letters of Administration are continued to July 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-15-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-17-2018 Continued To May-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-17-2018 Continued To May-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for San Francisco Public Administrator (Petitioner)
J. Scott Corporon for Carol Ann Golden via Court Call

The Court noted there are competing petitions and a will contest. Mr. Weinkauf stated that he has received the Will Contest and is agreeable to accept service on behalf of the San Francisco Public Administrator. In response to an inquiry from the Court, Mr. Weinkauf stated that the parties have not yet discussed how to proceed to get the Will Contest resolved. Mr. Corporon stated that he spoke briefly with Mr. Weinkauf early on, thinks it would be helpful to communicate with Mr. Weinkauf, and requested a reasonable continuance to hash out details with Mr. Weinkauf. The Amended Petition for Probate of Will and Letters of Administration with Will Annexed, and Second Amended Petition for Letters of Administration are continued to May 15, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for parties to discuss a resolution for Will Contest and to address them at the next hearing.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Craig Blackstone. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
